name_en: HP-350N HEATPROOF Heat Resistant Label
name_zh: HP-350N HEATPROOF 耐高温标签
adhesive_en: Pressure-sensitive adhesive (category-level statement on Labels for Heat Treatment page)
adhesive_zh: 压敏胶（“热处理用标签”品类页的整体说明）
application_en: Dual-use label: direct hot application on hot steel and aluminum surfaces up to 400℃ (apply-to-hot), and heat treatment process management applied from room temperature then heated (apply-cold-then-heat) through annealing, homogenizing and reflow processes. Case studies: aluminum billet homogenizing (applied at room temperature, then 550℃ x 12 hours) and injection casting mold management (200〜400℃, multiple cycles). Industries: steel, aluminum, ceramic, automotive, electronics, casting/jig management.
application_zh: 两用标签：可直接贴附于最高400℃的高温钢材和铝材表面（热贴），也可在室温贴附后经受加热（冷贴后加热），用于退火、均质化、回流焊等热处理工序的过程管理。应用案例：铝坯均质化工艺（室温贴附后550℃ x 12小时）、注射铸造模具管理（200〜400℃，多次循环）。行业：钢铁、铝业、陶瓷、汽车、电子、铸造/治具管理。
industries: Steel | Aluminum | Ceramic | Automotive | Electronics | Casting
features_en: Application temperature up to 400℃ (can be applied to hot surfaces) | Application temperature from room temp to 400℃ | Maximum heat resistance to 600℃ | Excellent ink stability and resistance to ink smudging when applying at high temperatures
features_zh: 贴附温度最高可达400℃（可直接贴附于高温表面） | 贴附温度范围：室温至400℃ | 最高耐热温度600℃ | 高温贴附时油墨稳定性优异，抗油墨晕染
benefits_en: Identify and barcode products at high temperatures, or track products through high temperature processes | Variable information and barcodes can be printed on demand with standard thermal transfer printers
benefits_zh: 可在高温下对产品进行标识和条码化，或在高温工序中跟踪产品 | 可用标准热转印打印机按需打印可变信息和条码
temperature_performance: Application temperature up to 400℃ (from room temp to 400℃); maximum heat resistance to 600℃

name_en: HP-600 HEATPROOF Label for Direct Hot Application
name_zh: HP-600 HEATPROOF 高温直贴标签
adhesive_zh: 热活化型胶粘剂
application_en: Direct hot application (apply-to-hot) on hot steel and aluminum products immediately after casting/rolling, at surface temperatures from 250℃ to 600℃. Installation examples: steel hot coil at 550℃ and aluminum sow at 500℃, applied manually or with robotic labeler systems. Industries: steel, aluminum.
application_zh: 高温直贴（热贴）标签，可在铸造/轧制后立即贴附于表面温度250℃至600℃的高温钢材和铝材产品。安装示例：550℃的热轧钢卷、500℃的铝锭（sow），可人工或用机器人贴标系统贴附。行业：钢铁、铝业。
industries: Steel | Aluminum
features_en: Application temperature from 250℃ to 600℃ | Maximum heat resistance to 600℃ | Heat activated adhesive (activated by hot direct application)
features_zh: 贴附温度范围：250℃至600℃ | 最高耐热温度600℃ | 热活化型胶粘剂（通过高温直贴激活）
benefits_en: Identify and barcode hot coils soon after rolling; products can be accurately identified and verified downstream using barcode scanners | Labels printed on demand or pre-printed using standard thermal transfer printers
benefits_zh: 轧制后即可对热轧卷进行标识和条码化；下游工序可用条码扫描器准确识别和核验产品 | 可用标准热转印打印机按需打印或预印标签
temperature_performance: Application temperature from 250℃ to 600℃; maximum heat resistance to 600℃

name_en: HP-700T HEATPROOF Label for Direct Hot Application
name_zh: HP-700T HEATPROOF 高温直贴标签
adhesive_zh: 热活化型胶粘剂
application_en: Direct hot application (apply-to-hot) on hot steel products immediately after casting, at surface temperatures from 450℃ to 800℃. Installation examples: steel slab at 800℃, steel billet at 750℃, steel bloom at 800℃, applied with robotic labeler systems. Industries: steel, aluminum.
application_zh: 高温直贴（热贴）标签，可在铸造后立即贴附于表面温度450℃至800℃的高温钢材产品。安装示例：800℃钢板坯（slab）、750℃钢坯（billet）、800℃大方坯（bloom），可用机器人贴标系统贴附。行业：钢铁、铝业。
industries: Steel | Aluminum
features_en: Application temperature from 450℃ to 800℃ | Heat resistance up to 800℃ | Heat activated adhesive (activated by hot direct application)
features_zh: 贴附温度范围：450℃至800℃ | 耐热温度最高800℃ | 热活化型胶粘剂（通过高温直贴激活）
benefits_en: Automatically identify each hot slab/billet with visually clear identification and barcodes | Verify product identity downstream using barcode scanners, cameras or imaging systems
benefits_zh: 自动对每块热板坯/钢坯进行清晰可视的标识和条码识别 | 下游工序可用条码扫描器、相机或成像系统核验产品身份
temperature_performance: Application temperature from 450℃ to 800℃; heat resistance up to 800℃

name_en: HP-900 HEATPROOF Label for Direct Hot Application
name_zh: HP-900 HEATPROOF 高温直贴标签
adhesive_zh: 热活化型胶粘剂
application_en: Direct hot application (apply-to-hot) on hot steel and aluminum products immediately after casting, at surface temperatures from 450℃ up to 900℃ (highest application temperature in the HEATPROOF direct hot application lineup). Industries: steel, aluminum.
application_zh: 高温直贴（热贴）标签，可在铸造后立即贴附于表面温度450℃至最高900℃的高温钢材和铝材产品（HEATPROOF高温直贴系列中贴附温度最高的型号）。行业：钢铁、铝业。
industries: Steel | Aluminum
features_en: Application temperature from 450℃ to 900℃ | Maximum heat resistance to 900℃ | Heat activated adhesive (activated by hot direct application)
features_zh: 贴附温度范围：450℃至900℃ | 最高耐热温度900℃ | 热活化型胶粘剂（通过高温直贴激活）
benefits_en: Products can be accurately identified and verified in downstream processes using barcode scanners | Labels printed on demand or pre-printed using standard thermal transfer printers
benefits_zh: 下游工序可用条码扫描器准确识别和核验产品 | 可用标准热转印打印机按需打印或预印标签
temperature_performance: Application temperature from 450℃ to 900℃; maximum heat resistance to 900℃

name_en: HP-120S HEATPROOF Label for Heat Treatment Process Management
name_zh: HP-120S HEATPROOF 热处理过程管理标签
adhesive_en: Pressure-sensitive adhesive (category-level statement on Labels for Heat Treatment page)
adhesive_zh: 压敏胶（“热处理用标签”品类页的整体说明）
application_en: Heat treatment process management: applied from room temperature (apply-cold-then-heat) and tracked through reheat processes up to 220℃. Case study: identification of injection casting molds through 200〜400℃ multi-cycle heating (used alongside HP-150N/HP-350N). Industries: steel, aluminum, ceramic, automotive, electronics, casting/jig and asset management.
application_zh: 热处理过程管理标签：室温贴附（冷贴后加热），可在最高220℃的再加热工序中跟踪产品。应用案例：注射铸造模具在200〜400℃多次循环加热中的标识管理（与HP-150N/HP-350N配合使用）。行业：钢铁、铝业、陶瓷、汽车、电子、铸造/治具及资产管理。
industries: Steel | Aluminum | Ceramic | Automotive | Electronics | Casting
features_en: Application temperature from room temp to 220℃ | Maximum heat resistance to 220℃ | Chemical resistance | Strong initial adhesion | Excellent ink stability and resistance to smudging at higher application temperatures
features_zh: 贴附温度范围：室温至220℃ | 最高耐热温度220℃ | 耐化学性 | 初粘力强 | 较高贴附温度下油墨稳定性优异、抗晕染
benefits_en: Scan barcodes into and out of reheat furnaces; printed information and barcodes remain intact through the reheat process | Labels can be die-cut to any size and printed on site
benefits_zh: 进出再加热炉均可扫描条码；打印信息和条码在再加热过程中保持完好 | 标签可模切成任意尺寸并现场打印
temperature_performance: Application temperature from room temp to 220℃; maximum heat resistance to 220℃

name_en: HP-120SH4 HEATPROOF Label for Heat Treatment Process Management
name_zh: HP-120SH4 HEATPROOF 热处理过程管理标签
adhesive_en: Pressure-sensitive adhesive (category-level statement on Labels for Heat Treatment page)
adhesive_zh: 压敏胶（“热处理用标签”品类页的整体说明）
application_en: Heat treatment process management: applied from room temperature (apply-cold-then-heat), tracked through reheat processes up to 220℃. Case studies: barcode ID management of concrete building panels and pylons through autoclave curing (10MPa, 180〜200℃ for 12 to several dozen hours). Industries: steel, aluminum, ceramic, automotive, electronics, concrete, casting/jig and asset management.
application_zh: 热处理过程管理标签：室温贴附（冷贴后加热），可在最高220℃的再加热工序中跟踪产品。应用案例：混凝土建材板和电线杆在蒸压养护（10MPa、180〜200℃、12小时至数十小时）中的条码标识管理。行业：钢铁、铝业、陶瓷、汽车、电子、混凝土、铸造/治具及资产管理。
industries: Steel | Aluminum | Ceramic | Automotive | Electronics | Concrete | Casting
features_en: Application temperature from room temp to 220℃ | Maximum heat resistance to 220℃ | Higher chemical resistance than HP-120S | Stronger initial adhesion than HP-120S | Excellent ink stability and resistance to smudging at higher application temperatures
features_zh: 贴附温度范围：室温至220℃ | 最高耐热温度220℃ | 耐化学性高于HP-120S | 初粘力强于HP-120S | 较高贴附温度下油墨稳定性优异、抗晕染
benefits_en: Survives autoclave processes (10MPa, up to 200℃) with barcodes remaining scannable, enabling accurate inventory tracking | Printed information and barcodes remain intact through the reheat process
benefits_zh: 可耐受蒸压工艺（10MPa、最高200℃），条码仍可扫描，实现准确的库存跟踪 | 打印信息和条码在再加热过程中保持完好
temperature_performance: Application temperature from room temp to 220℃; maximum heat resistance to 220℃

facestock_zh: 更薄更软的AL（铝）基材，适合贴附于粗糙表面

name_en: HP-CBR CX2 HEATPROOF Label for Heat Treatment Process Management
name_zh: HP-CBR CX2 HEATPROOF 热处理过程管理标签
adhesive_en: Pressure-sensitive adhesive (category-level statement on Labels for Heat Treatment page)
adhesive_zh: 压敏胶（“热处理用标签”品类页的整体说明）
application_en: Heat treatment process management (apply-cold-then-heat) up to 1200℃; after the baking process the label becomes integrated with the substrate surface. Case studies: management of ceramic products (alumina, glass, carbon) and laboratory crucibles at 1,000℃ for several to a dozen hours (used alongside HP-CBR HB). Industries: ceramic, steel, aluminum, electronics, casting/jig and asset management.
application_zh: 热处理过程管理标签（冷贴后加热），最高耐热1200℃；经烧成工序后标签与基材表面融为一体。应用案例：陶瓷产品（氧化铝、玻璃、碳）及实验室坩埚在1,000℃下数小时至十余小时的管理（与HP-CBR HB配合使用）。行业：陶瓷、钢铁、铝业、电子、铸造/治具及资产管理。
